meanings.definition: establish after a calculation, investigation, experiment, survey, or study
examples: find the product of two numbers
The physicist who found the elusive particle won the Nobel Prize

meanings.definition: shape or influence; give direction to
reach, make, or come to a decision about something
examples: We finally decided after lengthy deliberations

meanings.definition: fix in scope; fix the boundaries of
examples: the tree determines the border of the property

meanings.definition: find out, learn, or determine with certainty, usually by making an inquiry or other effort
examples: I want to see whether she speaks French
find out if he speaks Russian
Check whether the train leaves on time

meanings.definition: having the power or quality of deciding
